headline: Domino's Pizza (DPZ) Down 8.8% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
summary: Domino's Pizza (DPZ) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Richard Delcid Wins Domino's® 2026 World's Fastest Pizza Maker Title
summary: Domino's Pizza Inc. (Nasdaq: DPZ) has awarded the 2026 World's Fastest Pizza Maker title to its new champion, Richard Delcid, among top competitors from across the globe at Mandalay Bay Resort in Las Vegas on May 13, 2026. Delcid, who is a general manager at Domino's in Manassas, Virginia, won the competition by making three large pizzas in a record-breaking 31.22 seconds! Delcid won $5,000 in prize money, a trophy, championship belt and the renowned title of World's Fastest Pizza Maker, present

headline: TD Cowen Maintains Hold on Domino's Pizza, Lowers Price Target to $350
summary: TD Cowen  analyst Andrew M. Charles   maintains Domino's Pizza (NASDAQ:DPZ) with a Hold and lowers the price target from $377 to $350.
